title: UK users - time lag and performance issue
excerpt: Is it only me are are your lag times between clicking and respnse from the monday system seriously in need of improvement.  Who can help?

posts.author: FranAnn (Fran Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it only me are are your lag times between clicking and respnse from the monday system seriously in need of improvement. Who can help?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Fran,

I am really sorry to hear this and can understand the frustration…

Are you able to elaborate a little further on the issues you’re experiencing? Is this behaviour reproducible in an incognito window? Hopefully we can get to the bottom of this

posts.author: FranAnn (Fran Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for your help. I’ve a huge cashe issue. Amtrying to sort it - monday is the only system affected so an instruction on keeping cookies and history under control would help. Many thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your reply Fran and sorry to hear of these issues!

As you mention you’ve had caching issues, can you please try clearing your cache and testing this once more?

If you’re using chrome you can check out the instructions here → Clear cache & cookies - Computer - Google Account Help

For any other browser, you can easily find instructions online, otherwise you’re welcome to share your browser and I can share instructions
